Document:
# Guide to Townsfolk
Townsfolk - the residents of the local town. A resilient group striving to survive and prosper in the Wasteland by banding together. If you like the idea of working together and helping the town prosper, then this faction is for you.
This faction will face external pressure from larger factions. It's up to the mayor how the townspeople will respond, whether through trading, negotiation, or standing their ground if demands are made for taxes, tribute, or technology transfers.
Below is a brief guide to the roles you can see in the main town.
[color=#a4885c]Mayor:[/color] Leader of Oasis, organize the town, negotiate with outside factions and work with the sheriff to help Oasis prosper.
[color=#a4885c]Sheriff:[/color] Noble protector of Oasis, deal with assailants, death claws, bandits and any other threats to your town. Work with the mayor to help Oasis prosper.
[color=#a4885c]Deputy:[/color] Trusted lawman of Oasis, obey your sheriff and maintain order in Oasis.
[color=#a4885c]Shopkeeper:[/color] Humble shopkeeper, stock your store and trade with wasteland people arriving in town.
[color=#a4885c]Mechanic:[/color] Skilled mechanic, repair robots, armor, weapons. Create new things for the town or for sale to wasteland travelers.
[color=#a4885c]Doctor:[/color] Use your skills and experience (real or fake) as a doctor to help townspeople and sell your services to travelers.
[color=#a4885c]Townsperson:[/color] Reliable townspeople, you are the ordinary workers of the town, caring for crops and animals and doing work to help the town grow and achieve prosperity.
